name_en: 🆕【 M11989 Printed 】This Rosalie coin purse is made of Monogram canvas with bright grain leather lining, offering ample space in a compact design. It features a fan-fold compartment, card slots, and a coin purse with a leather pull tab. 11 x 8 x 2.5 cm (L x H x W)
